stories.headline: Harry and Meghan arrive in the Middle East for summit on refugees' needs
stories.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's trip to Jordan is their first international tour as a couple since August 2024.

stories.headline: Senegal prime minister decries Morocco’s jailing of fans after AFCON final
stories.description: Morocco sentenced 18 Senegalese football fans last Thursday following disturbances at the Africa Cup of Nations final.

stories.headline: Syria faces twin battles as Assad loyalists and ISIL attack in west, east
stories.description: A shadowy armed group linked to regime remnants launched an attack on security positions in Latakia.

stories.headline: Fact-checking Donald Trump’s State of the Union address
stories.description: The US president exaggerates on economy and immigration amid sagging popularity before the crucial midterm elections.

stories.headline: South Africa secures return of 11 men ‘lured’ into Russia-Ukraine war
stories.description: South African President Ramaphosa expresses ‘heartfelt gratitude’ to Russia’s Putin for support in repatriating men.
